title: bossiaea divaricata
intro: Bossiaea divaricata, also known as the spreading bossiaea, is a flowering plant species in the family Polygalaceae, native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bossiaea divaricata are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
